title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Godrej Appliances

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Godrej Appliances
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Appliances has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!
